operation.name: write_at_vgem_dmamove_buf_mark_staged
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun cur_state () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  (_ bv1 32) (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv1 32) ) (select  cur_state (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun cur_state () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  cur_state (_ bv1 32) ) (select  cur_state (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (=  false (=  (_ bv1 32) ?B1 ) ) (=  false (=  (_ bv0 32) (ite  (=  false (=  (_ bv2 32) ?B1 ) ) (_ bv0 32) (_ bv1 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: vgem_buf_state.state stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets state without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
